title: Leaves Drop OP Items
description: Break leaves → get insane loot. Works on all versions from 1.18+ to 1.21+ with zero setup.
body:
So basically, I noticed Modrinth barely has any good datapacks for this super popular idea. And even the ones that exist only support a few versions… kinda outdated vibes 😅

So I pulled up and made a fresh, fully polished, version-universal datapack where:


🍃 Breaking any leaf block drops OP items

💥 Perfect for speedruns, challenge videos, or chaotic survival

🟩 Supports every version from 1.18+ all the way to 1.21+

⚡ No commands needed — just drag, drop, and start breaking leaves



If you want easy loot, fast progress, or a fun twist for your world, this datapack just hits different.
Enjoy the chaos, go farm those leaves, and have fun creating content or trolling your friends ✨
